{{- $projectName := .Site.Title -}}
{{- $description := .Site.Params.description | default "Documentation site for Lesstruct." -}}
# {{ $projectName }} — Full Documentation

> {{ $description }}

> This file concatenates every documentation page on the site in section order.
> For a slim index, see `/llms.txt`. For per-page fetching, use each page's `/<path>/index.md` URL.

{{- range .Site.Sections.ByWeight }}
## Section: {{ .Title | default (humanize .Section) }}

{{ range .Pages.ByWeight }}
{{- $title := "" -}}
{{- if .Title -}}
  {{- $title = .Title -}}
{{- else -}}
  {{- $h1 := index (findRE "^#\\s+([^\n]+)" .RawContent 1) 0 -}}
  {{- if $h1 -}}
    {{- $title = replaceRE "^#\\s+" "" $h1 -}}
  {{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- if not $title -}}
  {{- $title = .File.BaseFileName | humanize | title -}}
{{- end -}}
### {{ $title }}

Source: [{{ .RelPermalink }}index.html]({{ .RelPermalink }}index.html)
{{ with .Description }}{{ . }}
{{ else }}Reference page for {{ $title }}.{{ end }}

{{ .RawContent }}

---

{{ end }}
{{- end }}
